title: Evangelion Units in 30
wikitext:
[]: [Spoilers] Evangelion Units in 3.0             Quote Post by Eva Unit 18 » Thu Nov 12, 2009 12:31 pm Everyone is talking about unit 08 but I haven't seen it yet and what about unit 07 will they appear in 3.0? Mark spoilers and don't put spoilers in the thread title

[]:             Quote Post by Natsuka_Chie » Thu Nov 12, 2009 12:43 pm Unit 08 appears in the trailler. After the ending credits of rebuild 2.0. Unit 07, not sure it appeared. And they'll probably appear in 3.0, IF (it's a huge IF) Anno is not trolling again x.x

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Unit 18 » Thu Nov 12, 2009 1:06 pm Does anybody have any pics?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Nov 12, 2009 1:14 pm We don't know a damn thing about anything at this point, really. Here's a link to pictures though: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=8017

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Thu Nov 12, 2009 1:37 pm Some pics of Eva-08:

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Nov 12, 2009 2:42 pm It kinda looks likes its flying but upside down or something with that magic super Halo above it.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Unit 18 » Fri Nov 13, 2009 6:32 am I heard Shinji is going to pilot it

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Nov 13, 2009 6:55 am Eva Unit 18 wrote: I heard Shinji is going to pilot it

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Nov 13, 2009 1:02 pm Because we all really know, on current form, that it's going to be DJ Croft.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Nov 13, 2009 1:10 pm ^ Tom Dyron will kick that English midget's ass before he gets to even look at 08.

[]:             Quote Post by Pcnerdjack14 » Fri Nov 13, 2009 2:43 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Tom Dyron will kick that English midget's ass before he gets to even look at 08.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:07 pm With all that drinking, wrestling and swearing going on? Hell no! It would be TOTALAWESOMERADMAXTREMECOOL!

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:13 pm I know what unit 07 is... Hah! Take that, Anno!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:25 pm Needs more glowing neon colored parts.

[]:             Quote Post by Pcnerdjack14 » Fri Nov 13, 2009 3:37 pm SaltyJoe wrote: With all that drinking, wrestling and swearing going on? Hell no! It would be TOTALAWESOMERADMAXTREMECOOL!

[]:             Quote Post by Hiten777 » Tue Dec 01, 2009 11:04 pm Shinji...piloting something not Unit 01....BLASPHEMY and totally messing up the whole plot.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Dec 01, 2009 11:33 pm Not necessarily, if we go with the idea of the core containing Yui's soul being carried over to the other Evangelion. Besides, NERV has considered having Shinji pilot Unit 00, and it (technically) worked, as far as mechanics go.

[]:             Quote Post by cojax8 » Wed Dec 02, 2009 1:21 am Hiten777 wrote: Shinji...piloting something not Unit 01....BLASPHEMY and totally messing up the whole plot.

[]:             Quote Post by Kamina » Wed Dec 02, 2009 2:17 am The new EVA's in the trailer all looked cool, i just hope the film uses them well and doesn't just paste them in for no reason what so ever, or bog the movie down somehow. If either ends up being the case, i wont be happy with the new EVA units. Also am i the only one who like the old model for unit 4, the EVA was depicted piloted by Kwaru in the Japanese Evangelion 2 ps2 game. To bad it never got used in the films so far or the old series, the silver paint job looked cool even tho it looked like unit 3 with different colors .

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Wed Dec 02, 2009 3:03 pm Shogo-Kun wrote:
